name: ThemeSpec

aliases.name: ThemeSpec
aliases.type: { fontTitle : String.String, fontText : String.String, fontCode : String.String, borderRadius : String.String, borderRadiusLarge : String.String, focus : String.String, background : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecBackground, base : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, accent : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, success : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, warning : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor, danger : ThemeSpec.ThemeSpecColor }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecBackground
aliases.type: { base : String.String, dark : String.String, darker : String.String, shadow : String.String }

aliases.name: ThemeSpecColor
aliases.type: { base : String.String, light : String.String, lighter : String.String, shadow : String.String }

values.name: borderRadius
values.comment:
`var(--tmspc-border-radius)`

Usually used for the border radius of small elements. (e.g. buttons)

values.name: borderRadiusLarge
values.comment:
`var(--tmspc-border-radius-large)`

Usually used for the border radius of large elements. (e.g. cards)

values.name: sample
values.comment: Renders an element that showcases all the current theme's colors and settings.

values.name: theme
values.comment: Used for turning a `ThemeSpec` into a `Theme` used by [elm-theme-provider](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/uncover-co/elm-theme-provider/latest/).
